title: lasianthus perakensis
intro: Lasianthus perakensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the Perak lasianthus or the Malayan tea tree. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lasianthus perakensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus perakensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
